zh.Tenterden, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特騰特爾登
zh.lifeSummary: 當Nathaniel Ely Jr於1605年出生在英國肯特騰特爾登時，他的父親Nathaniel Ely Sr.33歲，母親Susan Dowle29歲。他於1639年與Susanna Martha Tuffnell在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1675年12月25日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼斯普林菲爾德享年70歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德斯普林菲爾德 其特利。

zh-hans.Tenterden, Kent, England: 英国英格兰肯特騰特爾登
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nathaniel Ely Jr于1605年出生在英国肯特騰特爾登时，他的父亲Nathaniel Ely Sr.33岁，母亲Susan Dowle29岁。他于1639年与Susanna Martha Tuffnell在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1675年12月25日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼斯普林菲爾德享年70岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德斯普林菲爾德 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Ely
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Ely, a cathedral city on an island in the fens north of Cambridge, so named from Old English ǣl ‘eel’ + gē ‘district’.
English, French, and Breton (Finistère): from the Middle English, Old French personal name Elie, Hely (Elijah in the King James Bible); see Ellis and Elias .

variants.name: Ellis
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Elis, an Old French vernacular form of Elias, the Latin and New Testament Greek form of Hebrew Eliyahu; see Elijah and compare Elias , Lias , Ely .
English: possibly in some instances from the Middle English female personal name Elice, a pet form of Elizabeth .

Welsh: from Elis, a shortened form of the Welsh personal name Elisse (earlier Elisedd, a derivative of elus ‘kindly, benevolent’). As usual in Welsh, the stress in Elisse is on the penultimate syllable -li-, which shifts to initial El- when the name is shortened to Elis. It later became confused with Ellis in 1 above.

variants.name: Iley
meanings: English (Durham): habitational name from Brent Eleigh or Monks Eleigh in Suffolk, or perhaps from Illey in Worcestershire. The Suffolk placename derives from an Old English personal name Illa (genitive Illan) + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’. The Worcestershire placename derives from the Old English personal name Hilla or Illa + lēah. Alternatively, the name may be a variant of Ely .
Perhaps an Americanized form of German   Ihle  .

variants.name: Elley
meanings: English: variant of   Ely   or   Ella  .

variants.name: Eley
meanings: German: from a vernacular form of the medieval personal name Eligius (see Eligio ), a Christian saint's name.

nameMeanings.name: Nathaniel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a New Testament name, which is derived from the Greek form of a Hebrew name meaning ‘God has given’ ( compare Nathan , which is sometimes taken as a short form of this name). It was borne by one of the less prominent of Christ's apostles (John 1:45; 21:2), who in fact is probably identical with Bartholomew . The spelling used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament is Nathanael , but this is in much less frequent use as a given name in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Nathaniel Ely Jr was born in 1605, in Tenterden, Kent, England, his father, Nathaniel Ely Sr., was 33 and his mother, Susan Dowle, was 29. He married Susanna Martha Tuffnell in 1639, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 25 December 1675, in Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 70, and was buried in Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

Il a épousé Susanna Martha Tuffnell en 1639, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 25 décembre 1675, à Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

Lui sposato Susanna Martha Tuffnell nel 1639, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. ko.lifeSummary: Nathaniel Ely Jr(이)가 1605년 영국 켄트 텐터든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nathaniel Ely Sr.(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Susan Dowle(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1639년 영국에서 Susanna Martha Tuffnell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1675년 12월 25일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 스프링필드에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드 스프링필드 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nathaniel Ely Jr nasceu em 1605, em Tenterden, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nathaniel Ely Sr., tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Susan Dowle, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Susanna Martha Tuffnell em 1639, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 25 de dezembro de 1675, em Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nathaniel Ely Jr родился в 1605 г. в местности тентирден, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Nathaniel Ely Sr. было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Susan Dowle, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Susanna Martha Tuffnell в 1639 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 25 декабря 1675 г. в местности спрингфиелд, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности спрингфиелд кеметири, спрингфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nathaniel Ely Jr nació en 1605, en Tenterden, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Nathaniel Ely Sr., tenía 33 años y su mamá, Susan Dowle, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Susanna Martha Tuffnell en 1639, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 25 de diciembre de 1675, en Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
